name: Dilisense
description: Dilisense provides an AML screening API covering sanctions, PEP, criminal and other watchlists. Its designed for developers who need predictable pricing and straightforward integration for compliance workflows.

seo.title: Dilisense — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: Dilisense: Dilisense provides an AML screening API covering sanctions, PEP, criminal and other watchlists. Its designed for developers who need predictable pric

when_to_use: AML sanctions screening API with predictable per-call pricing
PEP and criminal watchlist check for compliance onboarding
Developer-friendly AML API integration for fintech products
Ongoing customer monitoring against updated watchlists
Batch screening workflow for legacy customer base remediation

pros: Predictable flat pricing, rare in AML screening
Covers sanctions, PEP, criminal and other lists
Clean REST API aimed at developers
Fast integration without enterprise sales cycle
cons: Smaller list provider than Dow Jones or WorldCheck
Adverse media coverage narrower than incumbents
Less brand recognition for tier-1 bank audits
review.verdict: Developer-friendly AML screening with honest pricing, a fair default when WorldCheck is excessive.
review.best_for: Startups and fintechs wanting sanctions and PEP screening with a flat, predictable bill
review.not_for: Large banks whose audit committees demand Dow Jones or Refinitiv as the named data source
